turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I want to know the consultation fee before I book an appointment. Doesn't make sense to book and then find out it's too expensive.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely fair. Which department are you looking at?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Verma's consultation fee is 800 rupees for a first visit and 600 rupees for follow-ups.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, that's reasonable. Is that inclusive of the prescription and tests or extra?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The consultation fee is just for the doctor's visit. Any tests or investigations ordered will be charged separately based on what's prescribed.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Alright. Good to know. I'll go ahead and book then.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Would you like me to book the appointment right now?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, let's do it. Tomorrow if possible, any time after 11.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I have 11:30 AM with Dr. Verma tomorrow. Shall I confirm that for you? What's your name?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sangeeta Iyer. And my number is 9871234056.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Booked! Sangeeta Iyer, tomorrow 11:30 AM with Dr. Leena Verma. You're all set.
